name: Seven Cities of the Golden Land
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>金</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>郷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>七</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>摩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using only Zombie monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material. If a Zombie monster(s) is Special Summoned by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 Set card in a Spell & Trap Zone; that Set card cannot be activated this turn (even if this card leaves the field). You can only use each effect of "Seven Cities of the Golden Land" once per turn.
eff: During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using only Zombie monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material. If a Zombie monster(s) is Special Summoned by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 Set card in a Spell & Trap Zone; that Set card cannot be activated this turn (even if this card leaves the field). You can only use each effect of "Seven Cities of the Golden Land" once per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Can only use certain Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
